text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At the Kikuka Sho paddock, Mejiro Ardan
suddenly feels an immense pressure she's never
experienced before—and its source is the smiling
Super Creek.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan is thankful for her first-ever
opportunity to face such strong competition.
With Yaeno Muteki feeling the same way, the
pair prepare for a race they know will test their
talent.
